title: astragalus parviflorus
intro: Astragalus parviflorus, also known as small-flowered milk vetch or small-flowered milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to stimulate the immune system and adapt the body to stress, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus parviflorus include enhancing immune function, reducing inflammation, and improving overall well-being, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus parviflorus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, capsules, and dried roots, which are often used to support the health of individuals with autoimmune diseases, cancer, and chronic fatigue.
